message:

ps aux | grep -E "librelane|yosys|openroad|synthesis" | grep -v grep | head -10` executed with exit code 0.

extras.command:
# Check if librelane/yosys is still running
ps aux | grep -E "librelane|yosys|openroad|synthesis" | grep -v grep | head -10
